templates.subject: [Study-Reminder]Your Day 0 Study Visit Has Been Scheduled
templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

This is a confirmation that your study day 0 has been scheduled for {{day0_visit_date}} at {{day0_visit_time}}.

Please make sure to start your 3-day patternized diet on {{day0_patternized_diet_start_date}} and collect your stool sample from the morning of {{day0_stool_sample_window_start_date}} to the morning of {{day0_stool_sample_window_end_date}}.

The in-person study visit will take around 4 hours and **you WILL BE dilated for eye exams**, so please plan proper transportation ahead of time.

Our study team member will meet you in the lobby of the Tschannen Eye Institute and guide you through the entire study visit process.

Please do not hesitate to reach out should you have any questions or concerns. Thanks again for your time and willingness to participate in our study, and we hope you have a great rest of your week!

{{email_signature}}

templates.subject: [Study-Reminder]Rescheduling: Study Day 0
templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Your study day 0 has been rescheduled from {{old_visit_date}} at {{old_visit_time}} to {{new_visit_date}} at {{new_visit_time}}. Your patternized diet will now start on {{new_patternized_diet_start_date}}, and you should collect your stool sample from the morning of {{new_stool_sample_window_start_date}} to the morning of {{new_stool_sample_window_end_date}}.

Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or concerns.

{{email_signature}}

templates.email_name: REMINDER: Patternized Diet Starts Tomorrow - Day 0
templates.subject: [Study-Reminder]Patternized Diet Starts Tomorrow - Day 0
templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Just a quick reminder that your 3-day patternized diet starts tomorrow. Please record all the foods and beverages you consume tomorrow on the food record sheet, as this will be your guide for the next two days. You'll need to follow the same diet as closely as possible leading up to your stool collection on your study day.

The goal of this patternized diet is to stabilize your gut microbiome so that we can accurately evaluate how the study interventions affect the composition of your gut microbes and their impact on eye health.

Please remember that your stool collection window is from the morning of {{day0_stool_sample_window_start_date}} to the morning of {{day0_stool_sample_window_end_date}}, before your study visit on {{day0_visit_date}}.

If you have any questions or need any assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you for your cooperation!

{{email_signature}}

templates.subject: [Study-Reminder]Your Day 0 Study Visit Is Tomorrow
templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

This is a friendly reminder that your study day 0 visit is **tomorrow** at {{day0_visit_time}} and will take around 4 hours. Please remember to **bring your stool sample and the patternized diet record and arrive fasted** (your last bite of food should be **before {{day0_last_bite_date}} at {{day0_last_bite_time}}**). Please also stay hydrated before the visit by drinking at least 20 oz of water the morning of the study visit. You will be provided with some snacks after the blood draw, but you are also welcome to bring some snacks with you if you want.

We are located at the Tschannen Eye Institute, 4860 Y St #2400, Sacramento, CA 95817. If you are driving in, we have a parking garage available in the front of the building. Please take your parking ticket with you when you enter the building. We will validate the parking ticket for you. A member of our study team will meet you in the lobby when you arrive.

Please arrive on time to allow adequate time to complete all of the study day-related tasks. Thank you and see you **tomorrow**!

{{email_signature}}

templates.email_name: REMINDER: Start Your 1st 3-Day Habitual Diet Record
templates.subject: [Study-Reminder]Start Your 1st 3-Day Habitual Diet Record This Week
templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Hope everything is going well!

This is a reminder that you will start recording your 3-day habitual diet this week (different from the patternized diet). The 3-day diet record should consist of two weekdays and one weekend. Please record everything you eat and drink, including all nibbles and snacks, no matter how small.

Here are a few tips to help you:
- **Maintain** your usual eating pattern during this time, and try not to change your diet because you are keeping a record.
- **Record** everything you consume each day (24 hours), writing it down as soon as possible after eating or drinking.
- **For meals eaten away** from home, do your best to estimate portion sizes, preparation methods, and ingredients. Indicate the name and type of the restaurant under "Place" in your record.
- **Use the back of the page** if you need extra space, and feel free to fold up the daily record pages to take with you.

If you have any questions or need further clarification, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your participation, and we look forward to receiving your completed records!

{{email_signature}}

After the visit we will give you an additional 90-day supply of study food for you to consume for the second half of the study.

The in-person study visit will take approximately 4 hours and **you WILL BE dilated for eye exams**, so please plan proper transportation ahead of time.

templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Just a quick reminder that your 3-day patternized diet starts tomorrow. Please record all the foods and beverages you consume tomorrow on the food record sheet, as this will be your guide for the next two days. You'll need to follow the same diet as closely as possible leading up to your stool collection on your study day.

The goal of this patternized diet is to stabilize your gut microbiome so that we can accurately evaluate how the study interventions affect the composition of your gut microbes and their impact on eye health.

templates.subject: [Study-Reminder]Your Day 90 Study Visit Is Tomorrow
templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

This is a friendly reminder that your **day 90 study visit is tomorrow** at {{day90_visit_time}} and will take approximately 4 hours. After the visit we will give you an additional 90-day supply of study food for you to consume for the second half of the study.

For this day 90 visit, please remember to:
- **Bring your stool sample.**
- **Bring your 3-day patternized diet record and 3-day habitual diet record if you have completed one.**
- **Arrive fasted** (your last bite of food should be before {{day90_last_bite_date}} at {{day90_last_bite_time}}).
- **Stay hydrated** by drinking at least 20 oz of water the morning of your visit.

You will be provided with snacks after the blood draw, but you are also welcome to bring your own if you prefer.

We are located at the Tschannen Eye Institute, 4860 Y St #2400, Sacramento, CA 95817. If you are driving, there is a parking garage in front of the building-please bring your parking ticket with you, and we will validate it. A member of our study team will meet you in the lobby when you arrive.

Please arrive on time so we can complete all study procedures smoothly. Thank you, and we look forward to seeing you tomorrow!

{{email_signature}}

templates.email_name: REMINDER: Start Your 2nd 3-Day Habitual Diet Record

templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Hope everything is going well!

This is a reminder that you will start recording your 3-day habitual diet this week (different from the patternized diet). The 3-day diet record should consist of two weekdays and one weekend. Please record everything you eat and drink, including all nibbles and snacks, no matter how small.

Here are a few tips to help you:
- **Maintain** your usual eating pattern during this time, and try not to change your diet because you are keeping a record.
- **Record** everything you consume each day (24 hours), writing it down as soon as possible after eating or drinking.
- **For meals eaten away** from home, do your best to estimate portion sizes, preparation methods, and ingredients. Indicate the name and type of the restaurant under "Place" in your record.
- **Use the back of the page** if you need extra space, and feel free to fold up the daily record pages to take with you.

If you have any questions or need further clarification, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your participation, and we look forward to receiving your completed records!

{{email_signature}}

templates.subject: [Study-Reminder]Your Day 180 Study Visit Has Been Scheduled
templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

This is a confirmation that your study day 180 has been scheduled for {{day180_visit_date}} at {{day180_visit_time}}.

**For the 5 days leading up to the study visit, please make sure you are taking the assigned study food every day. If you are running low on food supplies, please let us know ASAP so we can ship some additional supplies over.**

The in-person study visit will take around 2 hours and **you WILL BE dilated for eye exams**, so please plan proper transportation ahead of time.

Our study team member will meet you in the lobby of the Tschannen Eye Institute and guide you through the entire study visit process.

Please do not hesitate to reach out should you have any questions or concerns. Thanks again for your time and willingness to participate in our study, and we hope you have a great rest of your week!

{{email_signature}}

templates.subject: [Study-Reminder]Your Day 180 Study Visit Is Tomorrow
templates.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

This is a friendly reminder that your study day 180 visit is **tomorrow** at {{day180_visit_time}} and will take around 2 hours and your eyes WILL BE dilated. Please remember to **bring your 3-day habitual diet record(s) with you when you come for your last visit**.

We are located at the Tschannen Eye Institute, 4860 Y St #2400, Sacramento, CA 95817. If you are driving in, we have a parking garage available in the front of the building. Please take your parking ticket with you when you enter the building. We will validate the parking ticket for you. A member of our study team will meet you in the lobby when you arrive.

Please arrive on time to allow adequate time to complete all of the study day-related tasks. Thank you and see you **tomorrow**!

{{email_signature}}

shared_footer:
Zivkovic Laboratory | Goji Berry Study Team
Department of Nutrition,
University of California, Davis
--------
This email is an auto-reminder. If you have any questions about the study or schedule, please contact the study coordinator: Betty (Qianyue) Sun qbsun@health.ucdavis.edu.
--------
Important: We kindly ask that you refrain from including any personal health information or other identifiable details in your response. Protecting your privacy and confidentiality is of utmost importance to us. Any information shared should be general and not disclose specifics that could identify you or any health-related details. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation in this matter.
